industry: Independent Power and Renewable Electricity Producers
name: CECEP Wind-power Corporation Co.,Ltd.
summary: CECEP Wind-power Corporation Co.,Ltd. develops, invests in, manages, constructs, operates, and maintains wind power projects primarily in China. It owns and operates wind power projects with total installed and under construction capacity of approximately 1900 megawatts. CECEP Wind-power Corporation Co.,Ltd. was founded in 2006 and is headquartered in Beijing, China.
